questions.question: Define 'axiom' and provide an example of an axiom in discrete mathematical structures. Explain why axioms are a fundamental part of mathematical theorems.
Suppose a statement is proven as theorem T1 and then T1 is used in the proof of theorem T2. What type of statement is T2?
Provide the definition of 'proof by contradiction' and explain the role of this type of proof in mathematical theorems.
